final:
// // Shift address right by 2 bits and append two one bits
module top_module(
  input [9:0] address,
  input clock,
  output reg [11:0] q
);always @(*) begin
    q = {address, 2'b00}; // Shift address left by 2 bits
    if (clock) begin
      q = ~q; // Invert output if clock is high
    end
  end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // Shift address right by 2 bits and append two one bits
